description_blurb:
The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a report of an unidentified anomalous phenomenon (UAP) to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) consisting of a still image derived from a U.S. military system in 2025. The original imagery was altered with redactions before being submitted to AARO. An accompanying mission report was not provided. The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP. The date in the image is incorrect due to system date/time not being set.

Narrative Description: The monochrome image displays a grainy texture with a central crosshair reticle. A small, dark, circular object is visible in the upper right quadrant of the frame. The background appears to show an indistinct mountain range. This narrative description is provided for informational purposes only. Readers should not interpret any part of this description as reflecting an analytical judgment, investigative conclusion, or factual determination regarding the described event’s validity, nature, or significance.
title: FBI Photo B11
summary: The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a report of an unidentified anomalous phenomenon (UAP) to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) consisting of a still image derived from a U.S. military system in 2025. The original imagery was altered with redactions before being submitted to AARO. An accompanying mission report was not provided. The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP. The date in the image is incorrect due to system date/time not being set. The monochrome image displays a grainy texture with a central crosshair reticle. A small, dark, circular object is visible in the upper right quadrant of the frame. The background appears to show an indistinct mountain range.
reported_object_description: A small, dark, circular object is visible in the upper right quadrant of the frame.
official_resolution: The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP.
summary_zh: 联邦调查局（FBI）于2025年向全域异常现象解决办公室（AARO）提交了一份关于未识别异常现象（UAP）的报告，该报告包含一张源自美国军事系统的静止图像。原始图像在提交给AARO之前经过编辑和遮盖。报告中未提供随附任务报告。操作员报告称无法明确识别该UAP。图像中的日期因系统日期/时间未设置而显示不正确。该单色图像呈现颗粒状纹理，并带有中央十字线分划板。画面右上象限可见一个小型、深色、圆形物体。背景似乎显示一片模糊的山脉。
reported_object_description_zh: 画面右上象限可见一个小型、深色、圆形物体。
official_resolution_zh: 操作员报告称无法明确识别该UAP。
claims: FBI submitted UAP report to AARO in 2025
Report consists of a still image from a U.S. military system
Original imagery was altered with redactions
No accompanying mission report was provided
Operator unable to positively identify the UAP
Date in the image (12/31/99) is incorrect due to system date/time not being set
Image shows a small, dark, circular object in the upper right quadrant

报告包含一张源自美国军事系统的静止图像
原始图像经过编辑和遮盖
操作员无法明确识别该UAP
图像中的日期（12/31/99）因系统日期/时间未设置而显示不正确
图像显示画面右上象限有一个小型、深色、圆形物体
